data.body: Investigation complete. ROOT_CAUSE: After sync phase completes git merge origin/main commit on worktree, pre-commit hooks that restage files (e.g., ruff auto-formatting) leave files in worktree index; sync phase never calls 'git reset HEAD' on worktree before _state_mark_complete('sync'), so on resume the top-level dirty-check sees DIRTY_CACHED non-empty and exits 1 — unrecoverable loop. Confidence: high. Fix: add 'git reset HEAD --quiet || true' in _phase_sync after git merge call on worktree, before _state_mark_complete. Testing_mode: RED.
